source_intake_record.raw_question_text: Consider the OP AMP based circuit shown in the figure. Ignore the conduction drops of diodes \( D_1 \) and \( D_2 \). All the components are ideal, and the breakdown voltage of the Zener is 5 V. Which of the following statements is true?
source_intake_record.raw_answer_text: The maximum and minimum values of the output voltage \( V_0 \) are +5 V and -10 V, respectively.
